title: Example: How Fast Can a Canadian Small Business Get a Loan?
excerpt: Most Canadian small businesses can get approved for a business loan in 24–48 hours. Here's what determines your timeline and how to speed it up.
content:
Most Canadian small businesses can be approved for a business loan in 24 to 48 hours, with funds deposited in as little as one business day for amounts between $5K and $800K.

What determines how fast you get approved?

Three factors drive the timeline: the completeness of your documents, the loan product, and your time in business.

How do I speed up approval?

Have your last 3–6 months of bank statements ready, apply through a single matched lender instead of many, and respond to verification requests same-day.
author: True North Team
meta_title: How Fast Can a Canadian Small Business Get a Loan? (24–48 hrs)
meta_description: Canadian small businesses can get a business loan approved in 24–48 hours. Learn what affects your timeline and how to get funded faster.
